inspection_summary: Confirmed clean branch codex/story-engineering-playbook-export at 3efc23a; diff vs origin/main is the expected eight-file feature surface.
Diff vs old passed HEAD 048832c is only src/playbook-exporter.js escapeTable.

escapeTable now escapes backslashes before pipes/newlines, which addresses the CodeQL incomplete-sanitization pattern for Markdown table cells. The generated Markdown template table remains well-formed.

Exporter selection is auditable: core templates always selected; optional templates prefer Engineering Judgment / Gate DAG / route signals; fallback surface selection is only used when those stronger signals are absent.
CLI and workspace changes are additive: playbook export is wired into help/dispatch/smoke coverage, and workspace init only adds .vibepro/playbook.

Story, architecture doc, design-ssot.json, PR prepare, Gate DAG, manual export, canonical playbook JSON, and Markdown artifact are aligned on Japanese default output, selected/omitted templates, and current-head evidence.

Recorded verification evidence was inspected rather than rerunning tests or live GitHub checks inside the subagent. The local artifacts record CodeQL, analyze, test(20), test(22), typecheck, design-SSOT reconcile, focused tests, and playbook replay at 3efc23a.
Existing Gate DAG review/stale nodes are expected pre-record state because the previous review was for 048832c; this review is the current-head binding.
judgment_delta: Rebound from previous pass to current HEAD: the only implementation change is the escapeTable backslash pre-escape.
CodeQL judgment improved: the escape ordering now prevents preexisting backslashes from weakening pipe escaping in table cells.
Markdown regression concern reduced: generated artifact still renders the template decision table as stable four-column rows.
